project_type: Next.js 16 Multi-Tenant SaaS CRM with TypeScript + Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL
build_system: Next.js with npm scripts (npm run build)
test_framework: vitest for unit/integration, playwright for e2e. Tests are in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to check TypeScript compilation. 2. Run npx vitest run for unit/integration tests.
setup_instructions: npm install in project root. Requires Node 22+.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No database available so cannot run migrations or integration tests that need DB. TypeScript compilation check is the primary verification path.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns. API routes use requireAuth for auth, validateBody for validation, Drizzle ORM for DB access. Schema files in drizzle/schema/. API routes in app/api/.
key_patterns: API routes export named HTTP method functions (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE). Auth via requireAuth(request). Rate limiting via checkRateLimit(req, {action, max, windowMinutes}). Body validation via validateBody(schema, body). Schema definitions use pgTable with utils helpers (utils.pk(), utils.tenantId(), utils.audit(), utils.lifecycle()). FK references use .references(() => table.column, {onDelete: 'cascade'|'set null'}). Schemas defined with zod in lib/api/schemas.ts.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router (api/ for routes, tenant/ for pages). drizzle/schema/ - Drizzle ORM table definitions. lib/ - shared utilities (auth, rate-limit, api/schemas, audit). tests/ - vitest and playwright tests. components/ - React components.
